modules.title: All Staff
modules.desc: Introduce new employee to crew members and environment.

steps.heading: Procedure
items: Introduce new employee to crew members and environment.
Explain the operations, culture, morals, ethics and standards of company. (more – s)
— What do we do?
— How do we do it?
— How do we serve?
— Our Values
Create clocking ID
Go through job responsibilities.
How and when to do things
Go through systems and SOPs
Uniform policies

modules.title: BOH – Washing
modules.desc: Show and explain basic kitchen set up (Grill, Dressing, Fries, Washing)

steps.heading: Washing
items: Show and explain basic kitchen set up (Grill, Dressing, Fries, Washing)
Explain to keep area tidy – everything has a home.
Explain how to do washing
Hot water and soap – pay attention to details – explain hygiene is very important.
How to use dish washer
Where dishes go after wash/dried
Show where to get soap
Show how and where rubbish goes. Which days to be pushed out for collection.
Transit to training on fryers
Things to take note on
Need to explain it is important to make sure things are washed properly

The order of washing things to aid closing to be more efficient; trying to wash all containers early so that it can be put back to place (instead of leaving it on bench to dry overnight) – and also how to stack them to help dry faster – air flow
Benches (All) needs to be cleared every night – scrubbed with hot water and soap + sprayed with sanitizer then wiped down with clean cloth.

modules.title: BOH - Fryer
modules.desc: Show the setup of fryers – meat, fries/vegies

steps.heading: Fryer
items: Show the setup of fryers – meat, fries/vegies
Show how to read dockets – what fries person needs to drop + panko, spud etc
Explain the scoop sizes, and maximum number of scoops and wings in each basket
Explain times takes to cook. The importance of full loaded basket and normal load basket. Full loaded basket generally takes longer time to cook.
Show what is the standard serving color, portion and salt amount
How scoop fries into containers, bites containers setup with paper, loaded fries paper setup.
How to move fries to window area and where to position it for foh
Explain how to efficiently do fries – timing and order of procedure – further details*
Explain how if you’re waiting for fries to cook, do not just stand there to wait – either look at dockets and plan your next set of movements or continue back to washing

modules.title: BOH – Cleaning
modules.desc: Explain the setup of cleaning – what needs to be done

steps.heading: Cleaning
items: Explain the setup of cleaning – what needs to be done
Show checklists – explain how it works – explain the objective of the list
Explain order of procedure – how to be most efficient with time
Explain it is very important to clean and wash well
Show how containers, utensils etc should be placed
Sweep the floor
Show how to turn off fryers
Show how to filter oil – and how to use time effectively while filtering oil – washing*
Show how to set up oil machine – how to install filter paper – which dryer to filter first
How to use the oil machine – how to clean the scraps around– using the filter net
Explain while waiting oil to get filled up – continue washing
Show how to mop the floor – what chemicals to use – hot water – wet mop then dry mop
Rubbish – where the bin is
Show pictures on how closing should look like at the end

steps.heading: Opening
items: How to unlock doors
Where to get keys or if the key will be passed on to them – and if it is passed down, explain responsibility of it – sensibility etc. – what time we need to be here
Where to turn on lights and exhausts – exhausts must be turned on
How to turn grill on – 开锅,
Wipe down with water, turn grill on, leave it on for a bit then oil evenly.
How to turn fryer on
Explain why we turn these two on first – longer time to heat up
Check if we need to top up oil – within the two lines
How to open dressing bench condiments area – were to put the lids etc
How to set up stations
Utensils on grill section – 2x Spades, thongs, egg rings, bacon press
Utensils on fryer section – thongs, timers, baskets
Utensils on dressing bench – chopping boards, spoons, thongs and wet cloth
Help front of house open front – if necessary
Put money back in till box
Organize tasks and to do list for the day
See what prep/back ups needs to be done
Check cleaning schedule
Check what deliveries will be coming today and if space needs to be organised
Organize the day and set the pace

modules.title: Back Of House – Closing
modules.desc: Explain what time we close instore customers and uber tablets etcfc.

steps.heading: General Keepings
items: Explain what time we close instore customers and uber tablets etcfc.
Explain what time we can begin to prepare to close – start as soon as its not busy – washing, prepping back ups, rubbish runs etc.
Divide to sections – washer and grill/dressing area etc.
Show how to use tablets and enter orders – refer to Front Of House Entering Order
Mopping – Wet mop then dry mop
End of day balance – how to count and where to put cash drop
Closing standards – cleanliness of things etc.

steps.heading: Dressing Bench
items: Explain how we can generally start cleaning this section at an earlier time
What needs to be wiped down and how to wipe it down – edges, rims etc
Check backups – ensure back ups are down to aid tomorrow’s service
Write down anything that is not done
After closing time – then we can begin closing it
What to do with spoons and condiments – if they need to be put away and where to
How to glad wrap section and put lids back on
How to wipe down stainless steel surfaces with hot water, soap and scrub
Unsure area is clean and spotless

steps.heading: Grill Section
items: Explain how grill can only be turned off after closing time – not a minute earlier
But some utensils can be washed early
Explain how to turn off grill
Grill shoud’ve been on low if there wasn’t any orders to allow faster cooldown
Cold water to cool the grill down
How to clean it
What chemicals we use and where to get it – Detergent and Washing Soda
Remembering to wear gloves as the grill and steam is hot
How to scrub it and making sure all black spots are cleaned
Rinse it down with water and making sure that all chemicals are washed off
Making sure all around the grill is cleaned to – including bottom
Wiped everything with clean cloth again to ensure no stain, grease or chemical residuals
Ensuring the rest of the grill section and surroundings are cleaned
Grease tray under grill area must be washed every night
— One person pretty much focuses on these two area

steps.heading: Fryer
items: Explain how the fryer can only be turned off after closing time
Unless there were two fryers on and then we can turn one off first if its not busy to speed up closing process
Explain how to turn fryers off
How to check oil usability – visibility etc
How to use filter machine
Where to find it
How to change oil paper – making sure all edges are covered
How to position the net – ensuring the right side is hooked on to avoid hazard
How to filter the oil
How to connect pipe
Need to bring middle net up to aid cleaning -网
How to connect power and turn on machine
Ensuring all areas are washed and cleaned – no crumbs left – including sides and edges – be careful around the temperature wiring area
How long oil should be filtered for depending on usability
How to close pipes and disconnect it – let oil residuals drip out and use cloth to help disconnect it as it is hot
Where to throw oil and how to do it
Ensuring all fryers are turned off properly
Ensuring all surfaces are wiped and cleaned
— How to alternate between fryers if not both are turned on all the time

modules.title: Front of House – Entering Order
modules.desc: Show and explain computer set up

steps.heading: Entering Order
items: Show and explain computer set up
How to open up Vectron
What the home page is eg. Orders, clockings etc
How to clock on and log in to order page
Show how to take inhouse orders
Show what the categories are
Sub categories
Add ons, takes off,
Any other modifications; vegan, gluten-free, halah,
Requests – ta cup, cut in half – expand for Benji coffee/breakfast etc.
How to enter it as a shop order, phone order and delivery order
Shop order – how to pay eg. Cash or eftpos
Phone pick up order – how to enter phone number and save order
Phone delivery order – how to enter address and pay over phone/save order (cash)
Show and explain all the tablets eg. Uber, Doordash, Menulog etc.
Show which tablet is which
How it works
What sound it makes and how to accept/confirm orders
Show how we need to use “Uber” page to enter items due to price difference
Explain how add ons, takes off, mods etc. are the same as normal order
Show how to put payment through under different buttons; uber, doordash etc.
Show how/ when to click ready button
Explain importance of communication
Need to let kitchen know theres new orders, especially when its quiet – order up
What to do with drink dockets
Always need to maintain open communication with team members
Let trainee familiarize with system
Transit to drink station

modules.title: Front of House – Customer Service
modules.desc: Show ways we would greet customers to make them feel welcome

steps.heading: Part 1
items: Show ways we would greet customers to make them feel welcome
Ensure we are not too 僵硬, need to be more friendly, more casual and down to earth
Guys/tradies – hey mate hows it going
Girls etc – hey ladies hows it going
Heyyy sis/ heyy bro
Don’t be robotic, be casual, be cool
When taking ordes always maintain eye contacts – don’t just stare at screen
Be confidant and comfortable
Repeat order back to customers to ensure the order is right
After finalizing order, ask if they want to dine in or take away
If dine in – DI/HH – with table number
If take away – TA – with name
Ask if they want to pay by cash or card?
Show how to put payment through
cash and card button – and show where to tap – tap’s just on the left
After payment, ask if they want a copy of the receipt
Show how to print receipts
Explain the difference between save and no save button difference
Save – prints to docket/kitchen
No save – does not print
How to reprint orders
Finalise transaction and let customer know how long for wait time

steps.heading: Part dua
items: 1. Always offer meals or upsell drinks
Eg. When customers order fries and burgers – would you like to make it in a meal for $1 only
When they’ve asked for a meal – did you want to upgrade it to a milkshake or smoothie
Did you want a LARGE or reg meal – emphasis or large
Marketing/ upselling tectics
Emphasis on what you want to sell with tone of voice and hand gestures
Eg. LARGE meal
Don’t ask open questions where they can have time to think. – give them the choice you choose
Eg. Instead of asking them did you want sides with that? – ask; did you want a large or regular side with that?
Body language
Open op shoulders and chest – seem confidant and welcoming
When pointing, do not use index finger as it may appear as rude/demanding. Use pinky or 4 fingers instead
Guide the customers, lead the pace

steps.heading: Part tiga
items: How to contact uber, doordash, menulog etc.
Explainwhen you will need to contact them
Delayed drivers
Need to contact customers
Make sure we get reimbursements for orders that needs to be remade
How to contact drivers/customers
Explain the different circumstances that you will need to contact driver/customers
Forgot item
Out of item
How to remove items from tablets
Long wait etc.
How to deal with complaints
Show complaint chart.
Improvise
Take the blame if we know it’s our fault
If fault is uncertain, do not apologies
Try handle it before passing it to someone else
Store credits
Explain situations that are appropriate for store credit
Show how to enter store credit on system
Show how to mark as redeemed after customer has used it
Explain appropriate credit amount

steps.heading: Drinks Station
items: Show and introduce drink station
Show where things are
Eg. Icecream, fruits and veggies, milk, washing area, back ups etc
Explain the different types of drinks and what to machine to make them with
Eg. Juices, milkshakes and blenders ad frappes
Explain how to read dockets
What to do with dockets after it prinks from machies – explain how communication is important – pass to person on drinks
Show what to do with docket after finish making drink
Show drink’s recipe chart
Explain and differentiate the ingredients – eg. What type of icecream this is, yogurt, neutral etc.
Make sure theres not too much wasteage
Follow recipe and measure – exact weigh measurements
Pass on tips
Tilt and hold on to milk shake cup at the start to avoid spilling
Stop and shake blender thing if its not mixing
If customer asks for thick – more icecream, less milk
Juice apple last in drinks to cleanse out
Make sure to decorate drinks
Syrups on side, sprinkles on top etc.
Make sure milkshakes are not too runny
Show where to put drinks and dockets after finish making

modules.title: Front of House – Prep
modules.desc: Show prep list and explain order to do it – most efficient order to do things

steps.heading: Prep
items: Show prep list and explain order to do it – most efficient order to do things
Buns should be cut early during the day to avoid cluster of space
FIFO – softdrinks, fruits etc.
Labeling of dates
Where to find stuff and where to do it
What happen when things run out/ nearly run out – let kitchen know
Everything has a home, things should be put back to their respective places
Always clean up after tasks
Hand basin is for hand washing only*

modules.title: Front of House – Alcohol
modules.desc: Only over 18s who have RSA can sell and serve alcohol

steps.heading: Alcohol
items: Only over 18s who have RSA can sell and serve alcohol
Explain the consequences and fines if it is done illegally
What to do if you’re under 18 – ask someone else who has their RSA to help
How to enter beer order
How to use the beer tap

steps.heading: Expediting Orders
items: Show and introduce expediting section
Window area
Heat lamp area – how to turn on and off
How to read docket
How to differentiate shop orders, ha and ta, ubers etc.
What bags we use – utalise bag space
How to plate dine ins
Ensuring all items are in bags – and tissues/cutleries
Ensuring drinks are handed out with drinks
Calling out orders
Call out by names – if customer’s not here, put under heat lamp – keep checking if customer is back to avoid order sitting there when customer is back without notice
Uber, menulog, doordash orders – call out for drivers – check how long driver is taking to arrive

modules.title: Front Of House – Opening
modules.desc: Explain opening time and responsibilities – everything needs to be ready by 11; tables, chairs, lights, till etc.

steps.heading: Opening
items: Explain opening time and responsibilities – everything needs to be ready by 11; tables, chairs, lights, till etc.
Wipe down all tables and chairs to ensure missed crumbs – floor too etc.
Check if there’s any urgent prep/backups that needs to be done
Make a list/mental note of the thing that needs to be done or stations that need to be cleaned – eg. Urgent preps to be done first, cut buns first etc.
Fill up drink bottles
Polish cutleries
Put away dishes
Fill up station preps
Preps –
Bacon, cheese, fruits, icecream, sotdrink etc.
Cleaning – follow cleaning schedule

modules.title: Front Of House – Closing
modules.desc: Explain what time we close instore customers and uber tablets etcfc.

steps.heading: General Keepings
items: Explain what time we close instore customers and uber tablets etcfc.
Explain what time we can begin to prepare to close – As soon as it’s not busy
Start washing dishes and drink bottles early through the night
Start giving empty tables and chairs a wipe down and making a mental note of which tables are wiped to avoid doing it twice – with sanitizer and hot cloth
Can begin sweeping floor if there’s no customers – cannot sweep if there’s customers in shop
Making sure all prep and back ups are done to aid tomorrow’s operation
Explain all stations must be cleaned
Drinks station
Milkshake machine must be wiped down every night – especially top and metal edge/rim parts to avoid milk solids build up
Blenders and the machine – machine must be wiped down too
Juicer – how to disassemble and wash – juice 网plate to be washed in kitchen, all parts must be scrubbed clean with hot water and metal scourer to avoid fruit solids to build up
Ice-cream fridge to be wiped down – hot to remove top glass to clean properly
Beer tap area – need to see how to wash first***
Expediting area and window
Making sure all areas are cleaned and wiped down – no food crumbs
Counter area
All tablets are charged
Area is tidy and organized
All stainless steel area to be wiped down with hot water and soap sponge
All other surface area are wiped down with hot cloth and sanitizer
Everything has a home – put things back to its respective places – don’t leave it around – be initiative and responsible
Dining area
Make sure all tables, chairs and bench area wiped and cleaned
Stack chairs up on table to aid sweeping and mopping
Chairs cannot be up before closing time – not a minute earlier
Floor is sweeped before mopping – clean floor makes it easier to mop – make sure all edges and corners are sweeeped
Mopping the floor – wet mop then dry mop – ensure to get all crumbs off the floor – becareful while mopping, it gets slippery
Ask kitchen boys to mix mop water for you – use FOH mop
Need to buy 2 mops***
Explain that closing should be done within reasonable timeframe
Emergenct – light box – fire – emergency light box(90)
